description: LFI attacks trick the server into reading sensitive files by manipulating file path inputs.

rules.name: Directory Traversal Sequences
rules.description: Detects ../ and ..\ sequences used to escape the web root

rules.name: Sensitive Unix Files
rules.description: Detects attempts to access known sensitive Linux system files

rules.name: Sensitive Windows Files
rules.description: Detects attempts to access sensitive Windows system files

rules.name: PHP Wrapper Abuse
rules.description: Detects PHP stream wrappers used to bypass file restrictions

rules.name: Null Byte Injection
rules.description: Detects null byte injection used to truncate file extensions
